programmes.show_description: Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Join us for an hour of fantastic DIY and gardening items at great value prices - perfect for all projects big and small.
Travel smart with American Tourister. Explore innovative, stylish luggage designed for comfort and convenience on every adventure. Ready to upgrade your travel experience?

Want to know what's hot in the world of electronics? Tune in and explore the latest innovations in TVs, computers, tablets, cameras and more from the leading brands you know and trust.
Find a range of year round practical home solutions from homewares and cleaning to electronics and DIY home improvement tools. This show will bring you the products you need to enhance your home.
Revitalise your outdoor space with Karcher. Discover powerful tools and tips for a spring garden refresh, making maintenance easy and enjoyable.
Get your garden ready for the autumn and winter with all the tools, tips and hints you need to get those ready-for-spring jobs done!

Let your garden light up with a little help from this show, offering plenty of ways to get your outdoor space glowing. Illuminate your path or dot your garden with pretty lights, showcased right here.
Tune in to see Shark's homecare solutions, featuring innovative technology designed to make your cleaning routine easier.
Transform your spring garden with Dibleys. Explore expert tips and stunning plants to create a vibrant outdoor haven this season!

Feel confident in Dansi Footwear. Based in Spain, their handcrafted, 100% leather shoes are a premium blend of comfort, durability and contemporary style, with a focus on attention to detail.

Discover Masai Clothing offering designs that combine uncomplicated Scandinavian design with high quality materials to create a wearable, fashionable and comfortable wardrobe for all women.
